Workshop 01
Mastering Visualization
JUNE 2026
From Prompt to Presentation

Transform AI-generated ideas into polished slide decks. Use Gemini and ChatGPT to generate visual content, then replicate it into structured slides with PowerPoint via guided, predefined-prompt stages.

Duration ⏱4 hrs
Tools ✦ Gemini P PowerPoint ✺ ChatGPT ✦ Claude.ai
Format 🤝Hands-on

Workshop 02
Mastering Agentic AI
JULY 2026
From Prompt to Agent

Design and build AI agents that automate tasks and streamline workflows. Use Microsoft Copilot to create low-code agentic solutions that respond intelligently and perform real-world actions.

Duration ⏱4 hrs
Tools ⌬ Copilot ✺ ChatGPT

Workshop 03
Mastering AI Video Creation
AUGUST 2026
From Prompt to Motion

Create AI-generated video by combining Gemini, Google Flow, ChatGPT, and ElevenLabs. Generate clips, structure outputs, and turn ideas into engaging motion content end-to-end.

Duration ⏱4 hrs
Tools ✦ Gemini ▶ Google Flow ✺ ChatGPT 🔊 ElevenLabs 🎨 Canva
Format 🤝Hands-on
